111111.name: The Creative
111111.description: Powerful creative energy. This is a time of strength, inspiration, and leadership. Act with confidence and purpose.
111111.judgement: The Creative hexagram is a time of great strength and inspiration. It is a time of great leadership and purpose. Act with confidence and purpose.
111111.lineTxt: The Creative hexagram is a time of great strength and inspiration. It is a time of great leadership and purpose. Act with confidence and purpose.

000000.name: The Receptive
000000.description: Nurturing receptive energy. This is a time to be open, accepting, and supportive. Practice patience and gentle persistence.

010001.name: Difficulty at the Beginning
010001.description: Initial obstacles and chaos. This is a time of new beginnings with challenges. Seek help and proceed carefully.

100010.name: Youthful Folly
100010.description: Inexperience seeking guidance. This is a time for learning and finding a teacher. Be receptive to instruction.

010111.name: Waiting
010111.description: Patience in timing. This is a time of anticipation and preparedness. Nourish yourself while waiting for the right moment.

111010.name: Conflict
111010.description: Facing opposition. This is a time of dispute or competing interests. Seek compromise or mediation.

010000.name: The Army
010000.description: Organized collective action. This is a time for discipline and coordinated effort. Find strength in community.

000010.name: Holding Together
000010.description: Unity and belonging. This is a time for building alliances and community. Seek connection with others.

111011.name: Small Taming
111011.description: Gentle restraint of small forces. This is a time for gradual development and small adjustments.

110111.name: Treading
110111.description: Careful progress. This is a time for mindful conduct and proceeding with caution. Watch your step.

111000.name: Peace
111000.description: Harmony and prosperity. This is a time of smooth interaction between heaven and earth. Enjoy tranquility.

000111.name: Standstill
000111.description: Stagnation and blockage. This is a time when communication between high and low is obstructed. Wait for change.

101111.name: Fellowship
101111.description: Community and partnership. This is a time of connection with others who share your vision.

111101.name: Great Possession
111101.description: Abundance and prosperity. This is a time of great strength and resources. Use your power benevolently.

001000.name: Modesty
001000.description: Humility and simplicity. This is a time for moderation and staying grounded. Avoid arrogance.

000100.name: Enthusiasm
000100.description: Inspiration and motivation. This is a time for joy and mobilizing support. Share your enthusiasm.

011001.name: Following
011001.description: Adaptation and following. This is a time to respond appropriately to leadership. Be flexible.

100110.name: Work on the Decayed
100110.description: Repairing what has been spoiled. This is a time to address corruption and decay. Restore integrity.

110000.name: Approach
110000.description: Advancement and opportunity. This is a time of approaching something valuable. Welcome what comes.

000011.name: Contemplation
000011.description: Observation and perspective. This is a time for seeing clearly and being seen. Gain insight.

100101.name: Biting Through
100101.description: Decisiveness and clarity. This is a time for firm action and breaking through obstacles.

101001.name: Grace
101001.description: Elegance and refinement. This is a time for beautification and enhancing appearances.

000001.name: Splitting Apart
000001.description: Disintegration and decline. This is a time when things fall apart. Accept the process of ending.

100000.name: Return
100000.description: Renewal and regeneration. This is a time of a new cycle beginning after reaching bottom.

100111.name: Innocence
100111.description: Spontaneity and naturalness. This is a time for acting without ulterior motives. Be genuine.

111001.name: Great Taming
111001.description: Accumulation of energy. This is a time for containing power and storing reserves. Build strength.

100001.name: Nourishment
100001.description: Sustenance and care. This is a time for proper nourishment and attention to what sustains you.

011110.name: Great Preponderance
011110.description: Critical mass and pressure. This is a time when something reaches its limit. Seek balance.

010010.name: The Abysmal
010010.description: Repeated danger and depth. This is a time of facing challenges repeatedly. Develop inner strength.

101101.name: The Clinging
101101.description: Illumination and clarity. This is a time for brightness and awareness. Gain clarity and insight.

001110.name: Influence
001110.description: Mutual attraction and stimulus. This is a time for exchange and reciprocity. Be open to influence.

011100.name: Duration
011100.description: Endurance and constancy. This is a time for persistence and steadiness. Maintain your course.

001111.name: Retreat
001111.description: Strategic withdrawal. This is a time to step back from danger. Know when to yield.

111100.name: Great Power
111100.description: Great vigor and strength. This is a time of great energy and power. Use it wisely.

000101.name: Progress
000101.description: Advancement and recognition. This is a time of rising and receiving favor. Move forward.

101000.name: Darkening of the Light
101000.description: Injury to clarity. This is a time when brightness is obscured. Preserve inner light.

101011.name: The Family
101011.description: Clan and structure. This is a time for domestic harmony and clear roles. Support your home base.

110101.name: Opposition
110101.description: Contradiction and polarity. This is a time of divergent views. Find complementarity in differences.

001010.name: Obstruction
001010.description: Difficulty and impediment. This is a time of obstacles and hardship. Seek alternate paths.

010100.name: Deliverance
010100.description: Release from tension. This is a time of resolution and easing of problems. Welcome relief.

110001.name: Decrease
110001.description: Reduction and simplification. This is a time to eliminate excess. Focus on what's essential.

100011.name: Increase
100011.description: Gain and abundance. This is a time of growing prosperity and beneficial influence.

111110.name: Breakthrough
111110.description: Resolution and decisiveness. This is a time for determined action to clear opposition.

011111.name: Coming to Meet
011111.description: Unexpected encounter. This is a time when something powerful appears unexpectedly.

000110.name: Gathering Together
000110.description: Assembly and cohesion. This is a time for community gathering and joining forces.

011000.name: Pushing Upward
011000.description: Gradual progress and rising. This is a time for steady advancement and promotion.

010110.name: Oppression
010110.description: Exhaustion and confinement. This is a time of being restricted or limited. Conserve energy.

011010.name: The Well
011010.description: Source of nourishment. This is a time to focus on what sustains community. Ensure resources are shared.

101110.name: Revolution
101110.description: Radical change and renewal. This is a time of fundamental transformation. Embrace the new.

011101.name: The Cauldron
011101.description: Transformation and receptivity. This is a time for alchemical change and spiritual nourishment.

100100.name: The Arousing
100100.description: Shock and awakening. This is a time of sudden change that stimulates new growth.

001001.name: Keeping Still
001001.description: Stillness and restraint. This is a time for meditation and stopping. Find peace in stillness.

001011.name: Development
001011.description: Gradual progress. This is a time for steady, step-by-step advancement. Be patient.

110100.name: The Marrying Maiden
110100.description: Subordinate role and impermanence. This is a time for recognizing limitations of secondary positions.

101100.name: Abundance
101100.description: Fullness and zenith. This is a time of peak prosperity and brightness. Embrace the height of your power.

001101.name: The Wanderer
001101.description: Transience and impermanence. This is a time of being in unfamiliar territory. Travel lightly.

011011.name: The Gentle
011011.description: Penetration and influence. This is a time for subtle action and persuasion. Move gently but persistently.

110110.name: The Joyous
110110.description: Pleasure and satisfaction. This is a time for joyful exchange and communication. Share happiness.

010011.name: Dispersion
010011.description: Dissolution and scattering. This is a time to disperse confusion and gather consensus.

110010.name: Limitation
110010.description: Boundaries and restriction. This is a time for establishing healthy limits. Define your boundaries.

110011.name: Inner Truth
110011.description: Sincerity and trust. This is a time for inner truth and integrity. Act from your center.

001100.name: Small Preponderance
001100.description: Predominance of the small. This is a time for attention to small details. Focus on precision.

101010.name: After Completion
101010.description: Completion and balance. This is a time when a cycle reaches its end. Maintain vigilance.

010101.name: Before Completion
010101.description: Incompletion and transition. This is a time of being on the verge of success. Make final efforts.
